_meta: Workspace-tier MCP config for LogueOS-Console. Gemini CLI discovers this when CWD is anywhere inside this repo (including the LogueOS-Console-w* worktrees that the dispatch_listener spawns into). DESIGN: 'logueos-gateway' is the SOLE audited-writes path — workers go through the LogueOS-Orchestrator MCP gateway for git/linear/docs/notion, which gates tools per the X-LogueOS-Tool-Profile header injected at spawn time. The other servers are READ-ONLY frontend toolkit + local test runners — they query docs/components (svelte, shadcn-svelte, lucide-icons), run local tests (vitest, playwright, a11y-scanner), or assist with reasoning (sequential-thinking). None of them write to the audit chain or Linear/GitHub/Notion, so they don't bypass per-trace access control. Operator interactive sessions in this repo get the same set. For direct write access cd into the Orchestrator repo and use the full MCP set there.
